_meta.description: HuntForge tool fingerprint database. Each entry describes a recon tool's resource weight, detection risk, network behaviour, and defender visibility. Read by HFLogger._get_fingerprint() to enrich TOOL_START events. Also consumed by Member 4's dashboard tool browser.

fields.detection_risk: How visible the tool is to a defender — 'none' | 'low' | 'medium' | 'high'
fields.category: Phase this tool belongs to in the methodology
fields.description: One-line summary of what the tool does
fields.network_behavior: What network activity the tool generates
fields.defender_visibility: What a Blue Team / SOC analyst would see
fields.evasion_notes: Red Team tips to reduce detection (educational)

subfinder.description: Passive subdomain enumeration — queries third-party APIs, never contacts the target directly.

defender_visibility.target_server_logs: none — target is never directly contacted
defender_visibility.ids_detection: none — all traffic goes to public third-party APIs

subfinder.evasion_notes: Fully passive. No direct connection to target ever. Safe to run without scope concerns.

httpx.description: HTTP probing tool — sends HTTP/HTTPS requests to a list of hosts to gather status codes, titles, tech stack, and TLS info.

network_behavior.request_patterns: Single GET / per host — low-noise but leaves access log entries

defender_visibility.target_server_logs: LOW — one GET request per host, looks like normal browser traffic
defender_visibility.dns_server_logs: Resolver queries for each probed hostname
defender_visibility.waf_detection: LOW — single benign GET; most WAFs will not trigger
defender_visibility.ids_detection: LOW — no payload, no scan signature; may flag on volume if many hosts probed quickly
defender_visibility.splunk_query: index=web_logs useragent="*httpx*" | stats count by src_ip
defender_visibility.snort_rule: alert http any any -> $HTTP_SERVERS any (msg:"httpx probe"; content:"httpx"; http_header; sid:1000010;)

httpx.evasion_notes: Use -H 'User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0' to blend in. Lower -rate to 20 when probing sensitive targets. Pair with -random-agent for additional cover.
